description_long: This street light features a tall, slender black pole with a hexagonal base that provides stability. The lamp head is a classic lantern-style design with a slightly tapered, six-sided glass enclosure, topped by a decorative finial. The glass panels are tinted a warm yellow, suggesting a soft, ambient glow when illuminated. The pole itself is mostly plain, with a single horizontal band at about one-third of its height, adding a subtle accent. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional urban or park lighting, blending both functional and decorative elements. The structure appears robust and weather-resistant, suitable for outdoor installation in public spaces.
description: A tall, black street light with a classic lantern-style lamp head and a hexagonal base, featuring warm yellow-tinted glass panels and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, hexagonal base, and the lantern-style lamp head with yellow-tinted glass panels.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the slenderness of the pole and the six-sided shape of the lamp head.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the lamp head and base, with the band detail on the pole visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again emphasizing the pole's slim profile and the geometric lamp head.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic lantern-style with a six-sided, slightly tapered glass enclosure and a decorative finial on top; warm yellow-tinted glass panels serve as diffusers.
